title: notodanthonia penicillata
intro: Notodanthonia penicillata is a rare and endangered species of grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Notodanthonia penicillata include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially providing relief from fever and other infections. Herbal preparations of Notodanthonia penicillata can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its extracts in topical creams and ointments.
